/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libcustom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so -o libcustom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/custom_interfaces/msg/detail/coord__type_support_c.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib:/home/yura/firstprogram/build/custom_interfaces: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so libcustom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_dynamic_typesupport.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libfastcdr.so.2.2.7 /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
